prompt: No argument provided, pick from list

assertions.name: lists-all-projects
assertions.description: Transcript shows all 3 projects (alpha, beta, gamma) listed

assertions.name: alpha-deactivated
assertions.description: alpha has active:false in output workspace

assertions.name: beta-activated
assertions.description: beta has active:true in output workspace

assertions.name: beta-lastused-updated
assertions.description: beta lastUsed is updated to a recent timestamp

assertions.name: reports-ready
assertions.description: Since beta is configured:true, transcript says ready to go or similar
